sections.sectionTitle: Jakob in Efraim leh Manasseh Thupha Pia

verses.text: Tua zawh a sawtloin, “Na pa a ci na hi,” ci-in Josef kiangah kigen ahih ciangin amah in a tapa nihte Manasseh leh Efraim a paipih hi
Jakob kiangah, “Na tapa Josef na kiangah hong pai hi,” ci-in kigen hi. Tua ciangin Israel in a tha sanin a lupna tungah a tu hi
Jakob in Josef kiangah, “Kanaan gam Luz-ah Vanglian Pasian kei tungah hong kilangin kei thupha hong pia a
kei kiangah, ‘En in, nang hong pungsakin, mihing hon khatin hong bawlin, nang' khit cianga na suanlekhakte' tungah a neih tawntung dingun hih leitang ka pia ding hi,’ hong ci hi
“Tu-in, Egypt-ah nang kiangah kong pai ma-in Egypt gam sungah nang' sung panin a suak na tapa nihte keima-a' ahi hi. Reuben leh Simeon-te mah bangin Efraim leh Manasseh zong keima-a' hi ding hi
Amaute' khit cianga nang sung panin a suak tate pen nangma-a' hi ding hi. Amau' gamh luahna-ah amau' sanggamte' min tawh amaute kilo khawm ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Paddan panin ka pai lai-in, Efrath tun' ma diak, Kanaan gam lamkalah ka dahna dingin ka zi Rachel hong si hi. Efrath (Bethlehem) paina lampi-ah amah ka vui hi,” a ci hi
Israel in Josef' tapate a muh ciangin amah in, “Hihte kua ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Josef in a pa' kiangah, “Pasian in hih lai-ah kei hong piak ka tapate ahi hi,” a ci hi. Amah in, “Kong thum hi; amaute thupha ka piak theihna dingin ka kiangah hong paipih in,” a ci hi
Tu-in Israel' mitte a khanghamna hangin maang a, amah in khua mu theilo hi. Tua ahih ciangin Josef in ama kiangah amaute paipih hi. Amah in amaute namin a kawi hi
Israel in Josef kiangah, “Na maitang a hong mu kik dingin ka kingaihsun kei hi. Tua hi napi, Pasian in na tate zong kei hong musak hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Josef in amaute a khuk panin lakhia-in amahmah lei lam nga-in a kun hi
Josef in amaute gel la-in, Efraim' taklam khut, Israel' veilam khutah, Manasseh' veilam khut, Israel' taklam khutah a paipih hi
Israel in a taklam khut zanin a nauzaw Efraim' lu tungah nga a, Manasseh a ta upa ahih manin, a khut kipaihpeh sakin Manasseh' lu tungah a veilam khut a nga hi
Amah in Josef thupha pia-in, “Ka pate Abraham leh Isaac in a na a sep Pasian, tuni dongin ka nuntak tawntungah lam hong pi Pasian

siatna khempeuh panin kei hong tankhia vantung mi in hih tangvalte thupha pia hen la, amaute sungah keima min leh ka pa Abraham leh Isaac' min kizomsak hen la, leitungah amaute mi honpi khatin khangsak ta hen!” a ci hi
A pa in a taklam khut Efraim' lu tungah a koih Josef in a muh ciangin, tua in amah lungkimlo sak hi. Efraim' lu panin Manasseh' lu tungah koih dingin amah in a pa' khut a la hi
Josef in a pa kiangah, “Hilo hi, pa aw; hih pen a suak masa ahi hi. Na taklam khut ama lu tungah koih in,” a ci hi

Ahih hangin a pa in nial a, “Ka thei hi, ka ta aw; ka thei hi. Amah zong mi khat suak ding a, amah zong lian ding hi. Ahi zongin amah sangin a naupa lianzaw ding a, a suanlekhakte, minam lianpi khat suak ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin amah in tua ni-in amaute thupha pia a, “Note, Israel sungah thupha na hi ding uh a, ‘Pasian in Efraim leh Manasseh bangin note hong bawl hen,’ kici ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua bangin Jakob in Manasseh' mai-ah Efraim a koih hi
Tua ciangin Israel in Josef kiangah, “En in, kei a si ding ka hi ta hi. Ahih hangin Pasian in nang hong ompih ding a, na pate' leitangah nang hong paipih kik ding hi
Tua thamloin, ka namsau leh ka thal tawh Amor mite' khut tung panin ka lak mualpang khat, na sanggamte' tung sangin nang' tungah kong piazaw hi,” a ci hi.
